exec zip -r plugin.zip plugin.php
exec wpry plugin.zip

cmp stdout out.golden
! stderr .

-- plugin.php --
<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Full Plugin
Plugin URI: https://example.com/full-plugin
Description: A fully specified plugin.
Version: 2.0.0
Author: Full Author
*/

-- out.golden --
{"file":"plugin.php","plugin":{"name":"Full Plugin","uri":"https://example.com/full-plugin","description":"A fully specified plugin.","version":"2.0.0","author":"Full Author"}}
